governance_bootstrap.summary: Completion requires mapped evidence and real environment verification before reporting complete.
Production changes must use origin/main, deploy_to_macmini.sh, Mac Mini runtime verification, and completion evidence guard.

problem: Mac Mini com.harness.edu-tier3-free was loaded and running hourly, but pending edu_consulting count stayed at 6526 because the high-precision Gemini gate had 0 candidates and the existing rule-skip patterns had no remaining matches.
fix: Rule triage now records candidates outside the curated Tier3 source allowlist as irrelevant skip markers while still excluding candidates that pass the high-precision keep gate. This drains low-quality backlog without deleting raw or filtered signals, and Gemini free-tier remains reserved for curated keep candidates.

verification.name: local syntax and candidate gate tests
macmini selective deploy
verification.result: pass: selected paths matched origin/main with diff 0 and backend relaunched on port 8000

verification.name: macmini bounded backlog drain
verification.result: pass: pending edu_consulting count decreased from 6526 to 6326; recent refined_outputs contained 200 edu-triage:rule-skip rows and no Gemini keep candidates were available

verification.name: macmini launchd remains loaded
verification.result: pass: LaunchAgent remains loaded with --free-tier --limit 10 --triage-limit 200 --cost-every 10, StartInterval 3600, last exit code 0

deployment.result: commit 4a25db9 pushed to origin/main and selected paths deployed to Mac Mini; runner source diff against origin/main was 0 after deploy

remaining_verification: None for the requested incident. The hourly launchd job should continue draining up to 200 low-quality pending rows per run while keeping Gemini refinement capped at 10 high-precision candidates.
